Class User

java.lang.Object
model.User
public class User extends Object
Represents a social-network user and the identifiers of that user's friends.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    User(String userIdString, String userNameString, String workplaceString, String hometownString, String passwordHashString)
    Creates a user.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User(String userIdString, String userNameString, String workplaceString, String hometownString, String passwordHashString)
      Creates a user.
      Parameters:
      userIdString - unique user identifier
      userNameString - display name
      workplaceString - workplace
      hometownString - hometown
      passwordHashString - encoded password hash

      public Set<String> getFriendIds()
      Returns the mutable set of friend identifiers maintained by the network model.
      Returns:
      friend user IDs

      public void setPasswordHash(String passwordHash)
      Replaces the encoded password hash.
      Parameters:
      passwordHash - new encoded password hash

    • setWorkplace

      public void setWorkplace(String workplace)
      Updates the workplace.
      Parameters:
      workplace - new workplace

    • setHometown

      public void setHometown(String hometown)
      Updates the hometown.

      public void setUserName(String userName)
      Updates the display name.

      public void addFriend(String friendId)
      Adds a friend identifier.

      friendId - friend user ID

    • removeFriend

      public void removeFriend(String friendId)
      Removes a friend identifier.
      Parameters:
      friendId - friend user ID

    • hasFriend

      public boolean hasFriend(String friendId)
      Tests whether the specified user is a friend.
      Parameters:
      friendId - user ID to test
      Returns:
      true when the ID is in this user's friend set
